Feature_Description: This procedure is used for the case when the UE moves from one gNB-DU to another gNB-DU within the same gNB-CU during NR operation for LTM (L3 Measurement).
Feature_Objectives: To enable the gNB-CU to prepare a candidate gNB-DU for an LTM handover by setting up a UE context.
To allow the candidate gNB-DU to respond with its acceptance and necessary configurations for the LTM handover.
Procedure_Implementation_Steps: 3. The gNB-CU sends a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU(s) for each candidate cell, containing one candidate cell ID and the CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM. The gNB-CU may provide the LTM configuration ID mapping list to the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request PRACH resources from the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request the candidate gNB-DU(s) to provide the lower layer configuration for the purpose of generating the reference configuration or provide the lower layer part of the reference configuration to the candidate gNB-DU(s).

4. If the candidate gNB-DU accepts the request of LTM configuration, it responds with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message including the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.

Code_Instructions.description: Data structure defining the format of the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message, used by the gNB-CU to prepare the request and by the gNB-DU to parse it.
Data structure defining the format of the F1AP UE Context Setup Response message, used by the gNB-DU to prepare the response and by the gNB-CU to parse it.
Helper function used by the gNB-CU to generate the content and structure of the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message before it is sent to the gNB-DU.

Helper function on the gNB-DU side responsible for decoding or processing the received F1AP UE Context Setup Request message from the gNB-CU, likely acting as an interface between F1AP and RRC/MAC layers.

Helper function on the gNB-CU side responsible for decoding or processing the received F1AP UE Context Setup Response message from the gNB-DU, likely acting as an interface between F1AP and RRC/MAC layers.
Utility function to generate a unique transaction identifier for F1AP messages, essential for correlating requests and responses in the F1AP protocol.

Information_Elements.IE_Definition: This conceptual IE represents the collection of Information Elements transported in the F1AP UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message.
This conceptual IE represents the collection of Information Elements transported in the F1AP UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message.
Identifier for a candidate cell for LTM.
Configuration of CSI resources to be used for subsequent LTM.
Resources for Physical Random Access Channel, which may be requested by gNB-CU for LTM.
Lower layer configuration provided by the candidate gNB-DU for the purpose of generating the reference configuration for LTM.
The lower layer part of the reference configuration provided by the gNB-CU to the candidate gNB-DU for LTM.
Lower layer RRC configurations generated by the candidate gNB-DU for the accepted target candidate cell during LTM configuration.

Piggy_Backed_IES_Info: Not applicable for the scoped messages in this procedure.
